This minor ice catalyst lets you give physical form to most basic ice spells.

|         | Diamond                |         |
| ------- | ----------------------- | ------- |
| Diamond | Water Bucket            | Diamond |
| Ice     | Prismarine Crystals     | Ice     |

Uses: 10/10
